---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for AuditorSEC LLM-Bridge
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem or gap does this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Feature Category

- [ ] New Audityzer scanner rule
- [ ] LLM reasoning improvement
- [ ] PQC algorithm addition
- [ ] New chain/protocol support
- [ ] API endpoint or integration
- [ ] Grant/compliance reporting
- [ ] Other

## Use Case

Who would benefit? How would they use this feature?

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Implementation Notes

Any technical details, dependencies, or constraints?

## Additional Context

References, mockups, or examples.
